# UrbanClay India - Industrial Clay Facade Manufacturer

UrbanClay is India's leading manufacturer of high-precision clay facades, flexible brick tiles, and large-format terracotta panels. Engineered for zero-failure performance in all Indian climates.

## Core Products
- **Flexible Brick Tiles**: Ultra-lightweight, bendable clay tiles for exterior and interior facades. Zero-failure adhesion.
- **Terracotta Panels**: Large format rainscreen cladding systems (up to 1800mm length).
- **Handmade Brick Tiles**: Artisanal, high-fired clay tiles for bespoke architectural projects.
- **Exposed Bricks**: Precision wirecut and pressed bricks for traditional and modern masonry.
- **Terracotta Jali**: Modern clay breeze blocks for natural ventilation and shading.

## Technical Specifications
- **Water Absorption**: < 6% for terracotta panels, < 10% for brick tiles.
- **Compressive Strength**: > 20 N/mm² for industrial grade bricks.
- **Fire Rating**: Class A1 Incombustible.
- **Thermal Performance**: High thermal mass for passive cooling in Indian summers.
